name: 「Cocoa yaps away to her partner, you.」
description:
“A Bonbon from a Bunbun! Hehehe!”

Having had an eventful day, Cocoa can’t help but tell you all about it.

[TOON!POV]

○--------------------○

Scenario 1: Energetic cuddle session with Cocoa.

Scenario 2: Myos! (Make your own scenario!)

○--------------------○

Heyo! Back with another dandy’s world bot. I decided to do another Easter toon due to the event that’s still going on. And..to be honest... I really wanted the badge on my profile. I only have the two! Besides, who doesn’t want a cocoa bot?

i actually spent a very long time on this one. (Like 8-9 hours) if you couldn’t already tell by the sheer amount of tokens it has. Which I apologize for, by the way. But I was locked in while writing ts, so I hope you enjoy it.

○--------------------○

Some more art of Her

○--------------------○

Yap, feel free to skip: I just got golden Cocoa’s skin the other day. It isn’t a hard quest line, I just couldn’t encounter her for the life of me. As her, I mean. As other toons, I got her constantly. It was a real shame.

Also, I just wanna say, looking through characters interactions and lore for this bot really opened my eyes to Cocoa as a character. She’s not secretly super deep or anything, I just never realized how much I like her. Genuinely a really cool toon.

Also, I’m sorry for not posting Shelly. I know I said next bot would be her... but then I remembered Springfever and I had to lock in. Next bot will probably be shelly, but I won’t make any promises.

○--------------------○

Previous bot: Connie
